Project.NAME: @osovv/vv-opencode
Project.annotation: Portable OpenCode workflow package with plugins and a Bun CLI for install, sync, semantic model-role assignment, and cross-device setup.

M-MODEL-ROLES.NAME: ModelRoles
M-MODEL-ROLES.purpose: Define built-in role IDs, `vv-role:*` syntax, concrete model-selection parsing, canonical role assignment normalization, shared role resolution helpers, and built-in role bindings for managed agents and OpenCode defaults.

const-BUILTIN_ROLE_NAMES.PURPOSE: Canonical built-in semantic roles: default, smart, fast, vision.

const-ROLE_REFERENCE_PREFIX.PURPOSE: Stable `vv-role:` prefix used by shared workflow config.

fn-isRoleReference.PURPOSE: Detect whether a model string uses the semantic role syntax.

fn-parseModelSelection.PURPOSE: Parse `provider/model[:variant]` used by canonical role assignments.

fn-resolveRoleReference.PURPOSE: Resolve a `vv-role:*` reference against the canonical role map and return a concrete model selection.

fn-getBuiltInRoleBindings.PURPOSE: Return hard-coded built-in role bindings for OpenCode defaults and managed agents.

M-CLI-CONFIG.NAME: OpenCodeConfigTools
M-CLI-CONFIG.purpose: Path resolution, JSONC-aware OpenCode config mutation, pinned plugin registration, role-reference writes for root OpenCode model fields and managed agents, canonical vvoc schema v3 rendering with built-in role presets, and installation inspection.

fn-resolvePaths.PURPOSE: Resolve OpenCode config paths plus the canonical vvoc.json path for the selected scope.

fn-ensurePackageInstalled.PURPOSE: Add the pinned vvoc package specifier to the OpenCode plugin array if needed.

fn-syncManagedAgentRegistrations.PURPOSE: Ensure OpenCode config contains vvoc-managed OpenCode agent registrations with `vv-role:*` model references.

fn-parseVersionedVvocConfigText.PURPOSE: Strictly parse vvoc.json as schema v3 and reject unsupported pre-role versions.

fn-syncVvocConfig.PURPOSE: Rewrite the canonical vvoc.json document while preserving valid user-owned role assignments and refreshing managed `vv-*` role presets.

M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.NAME: ManagedAgents
M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.purpose: Define bundled guardian, memory-reviewer, enhancer, implementer, spec-reviewer, code-reviewer, and investitagor prompt templates plus managed agent metadata, including built-in role bindings for managed OpenCode agent registrations.

const-MANAGED_OPENCODE_AGENTS.PURPOSE: Canonical managed OpenCode agent definitions used for enhancer/subagent registration.

fn-loadManagedAgentPromptTemplate.PURPOSE: Load a bundled prompt template for a managed vvoc agent.

M-CLI-COMMANDS.NAME: VVOCCommands
M-CLI-COMMANDS.purpose: Compose the `vvoc` CLI and expose init, sync, status, doctor, version, plugin list, config validate, role, preset, patch-provider, completion, guardian config, and upgrade commands for the role-based model system.

export-init.PURPOSE: Bootstrap package registration and role-based config scaffolding (interactive by default).

export-sync.PURPOSE: Refresh managed vvoc config files and role-reference OpenCode config.

M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.NAME: ModelRolesPlugin
M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.purpose: Resolve `vv-role:*` references in OpenCode root model fields plus agent and command definitions during plugin config hooks.

export-ModelRolesPlugin.PURPOSE: Config-hook plugin that resolves `vv-role:*` references for supported OpenCode config fields.

M-CLI-ROLE.NAME: RoleCommand
M-CLI-ROLE.purpose: List, set, and unset semantic role assignments in canonical vvoc.json for built-in and user-defined roles.

fn-listRoles.PURPOSE: Render built-in and custom role assignments from canonical vvoc.json.

fn-setRole.PURPOSE: Write a normalized concrete model assignment for a role.

fn-unsetRole.PURPOSE: Remove a custom role assignment while protecting built-in roles.

cmd-role.PURPOSE: vvoc role list|set|unset - CLI command for semantic role management.

M-CLI-PRESET.NAME: PresetCommand
M-CLI-PRESET.purpose: List, show, and apply declarative named role presets stored in canonical vvoc.json without rewriting OpenCode config directly.

fn-resolvePreset.PURPOSE: Validate a preset name against the current vvoc.json preset map.

fn-applyPreset.PURPOSE: Apply only the listed role assignments through canonical vvoc config writes.

cmd-preset.PURPOSE: vvoc preset <name> - CLI command for declarative multi-role model switching.

M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.NAME: GuardianPlugin
M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.purpose: Review OpenCode permission requests using a constrained hidden Guardian subagent whose runtime model resolves from the built-in `fast` role.

export-GuardianPlugin.PURPOSE: Register Guardian hooks for config, events, tool intent capture, and permission review via a hidden subagent.

M-PLUGIN-MEMORY-STORE.NAME: MemoryStore
M-PLUGIN-MEMORY-STORE.purpose: Store explicit memory under the vvoc XDG data root, keep shared scope global across projects, resolve scopes, and provide lexical ranking for search.

fn-loadMemoryRuntimeConfig.PURPOSE: Load canonical vvoc memory settings from vvoc.json.

fn-putMemory.PURPOSE: Create a scoped memory entry in the vvoc XDG data root.

fn-searchMemories.PURPOSE: Return ranked lexical matches across scoped entries.

M-PLUGIN-MEMORY.NAME: MemoryPlugin
M-PLUGIN-MEMORY.purpose: Add explicit memory tools to OpenCode and register the `memory-reviewer` subagent using built-in role-driven model selection.

export-MemoryPlugin.PURPOSE: Register memory tools and the report-only reviewer subagent.

M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.NAME: SystemContextInjectionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.purpose: Inject reusable system guidance into primary chat sessions while skipping known subagents so main-session behavior can be steered globally.

export-SystemContextInjectionPlugin.PURPOSE: Inject main-session system guidance such as proactive explore instructions without polluting known subagents.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-SESS.NAME: PlaceholderSession
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-SESS.purpose: Manage secret-to-placeholder mappings with HMAC-SHA256 hashing, TTL eviction, and max-mappings limits.

class-PlaceholderSession.PURPOSE: Manages placeholder lifecycle - creation, lookup, TTL cleanup.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-PATT.NAME: PatternSet
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-PATT.purpose: Build pattern sets from config keywords, regex rules, and builtin sensitive token detectors.

fn-buildPatternSet.PURPOSE: Build pattern set from config with regex normalization.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-ENGI.NAME: RedactEngine
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-ENGI.purpose: Perform secret find/replace with placeholders using interval-safe redaction.

fn-redactText.PURPOSE: Replace secrets in text with placeholders and return changed text plus match list.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-REST.NAME: RestoreEngine
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-REST.purpose: Restore placeholders in a single string back to original secret values.

fn-restoreText.PURPOSE: Restore all placeholders in a string to original values.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-DEEP.NAME: DeepTraversal
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-DEEP.purpose: Traverse nested objects and arrays for redaction or restoration with cycle safety.

fn-restoreDeep.PURPOSE: In-place restoration of placeholders in objects and arrays.

fn-redactDeep.PURPOSE: In-place redaction of secrets in objects and arrays.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-CONF.NAME: ConfigLoader
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-CONF.purpose: Load the secretsRedaction section from canonical vvoc.json with environment variable substitution.

fn-loadConfig.PURPOSE: Load and return normalized secrets-redaction config with warnings.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.NAME: SecretsRedactionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.purpose: Redact secrets from messages before LLM requests and restore them after, protecting sensitive values from provider-bound payloads.

export-SecretsRedactionPlugin.PURPOSE: Main plugin factory for chat-message redaction, completion restoration, and tool-argument restoration.

M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.NAME: ConfigValidate
M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.purpose: Validate canonical vvoc.json against the role-based vvoc JSON Schema v3 with human-readable error reporting.

fn-validateVvocConfigContent.PURPOSE: Validate vvoc.json content and report schema violations with line/column.

fn-validateVvocConfigFile.PURPOSE: Validate vvoc.json and report schema violations.

cmd-config_validate.PURPOSE: vvoc config validate - CLI command for role-based config validation.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.NAME: PluginList
M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.purpose: Display all installed OpenCode plugins with enabled/disabled status and source paths.

fn-listPlugins.PURPOSE: Scan OpenCode config and return plugin entries.

cmd-plugin_list.PURPOSE: vvoc plugin list - CLI command for listing plugins.

M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.NAME: PatchProvider
M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.purpose: Apply global OpenCode patch presets such as the `stepfun-ai` baseURL override, the `zai` provider model patch, and the OpenAI alias-model patch that installs `openai/vv-gpt-5.4-xhigh` for role assignment use without rewriting root OpenCode model fields.

fn-resolvePatchProviderPreset.PURPOSE: Validate supported patch preset names and map them to concrete OpenCode provider-object writes.

fn-applyPatchProviderPreset.PURPOSE: Resolve the global OpenCode config path and apply the selected preset without mutating root role-reference defaults.

cmd-patch_provider.PURPOSE: vvoc patch-provider stepfun-ai|zai|openai - CLI command for global OpenCode patch presets.

M-CLI-COMPLETION.NAME: Completion
M-CLI-COMPLETION.purpose: Auto-detect the current shell, install completion files idempotently, and generate bash/zsh/fish completion content including patch-provider presets, preset names, role subcommands, and built-in role ids.

fn-detectShell.PURPOSE: Detect the active shell from environment variables.

M-CLI-INIT.NAME: Init
M-CLI-INIT.purpose: Interactive project setup with prompts for scope and initial configuration, seeding canonical built-in roles and role-reference OpenCode defaults. Uses @clack/prompts.

cmd-init.PURPOSE: vvoc init - CLI command for project initialization.

M-CLI-UPGRADE.NAME: Upgrade
M-CLI-UPGRADE.purpose: Check npm for updates, install the latest global package with Bun, and run post-install sync from a fresh subprocess.

fn-runUpgradeFlow.PURPOSE: Execute the full upgrade flow, including Bun global install and warning-only post-install sync handling.

cmd-upgrade.PURPOSE: vvoc upgrade - CLI command for globally upgrading vvoc and then running sync.
